message:
fix(tui): rewrite split_diff_prefix with explicit byte-walking parser

The previous find()-based heuristic could misidentify the prefix
boundary when diff content started with digits or spaces. Replace it
with an explicit state machine that validates the expected structure
([+-] spaces digits space content) byte-by-byte, eliminating edge-case
misparses in syntax-highlighted diff rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
